 DSSSB Various Post Recruitment 2026 : Education Qualification 
Post Name Eligibility 
Junior Scientific Assistant (Biology)
  • Candidates must have a Master’s degree in Zoology, Botany, Microbiology, Anthropology, Biology, Human Biology, Life Science, Biochemistry, Genetics, Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, or Forensic Science with Zoology or Botany as a subject during all three years of B.Sc., from a recognized university. Alternatively, candidates with a B.E./B.Tech degree in Biotechnology are also eligible.
  • Age Limit : 18 – 27 years. 
Junior Scientific Assistant (Ballistics)
  • Candidates must have a Master’s degree in Physics, Mathematics, Applied Mathematics, or Forensic Science, with Physics or Mathematics as a subject during all three years of the Bachelor of Science degree from a recognized university.
  • Age Limit : 18 – 27 years.
Junior Scientific Assistant (Chemistry)
  • Candidates must have a Master’s degree in Chemistry, Toxicology, Biochemistry, or Forensic Science, with Chemistry as a subject during all three years of the Bachelor of Science degree from a recognized university.
  • Age Limit : 18 – 27 years.
Junior Scientific Assistant (Lie-Detection)
  • Master’s degree in Psychology/Criminology from a recognized University.
  • Age Limit : 18 – 27 years.
Junior Scientific Assistant (Documents)
  • Master’s degree in Physics or Chemistry or Forensic Science with Physics or Chemistry as one of the subject studied for at least two years / four semesters at B. Sc. Level, from a Govt. recognized University/Institute.
  • Age Limit : 18 – 27 years.
Junior Scientific Assistant (HRD/QC)
  • Candidates must have a Master’s degree in Physics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Chemistry, Botany, Zoology, Forensic Science, Psychology, Toxicology, Biotechnology, Genetics, or a two-year PG Diploma in Business Administration/Management with specialization in Human Resource, or MCA, or B.Tech. in Computer Science, Electronics, IT, ECE, or Instrumentation from a recognized university.
  • Age Limit : 18 – 27 years.
Junior Scientific Assistant (Photo)
  • Master’s degree in Physics/ Computer Science/ Data Analytics/ Artificial Intelligence /Information Technology/Forensic Science or B. Tech in Artificial Intelligence from a recognized University.
  • Age Limit : 18 – 27 years.
Junior Scientific Assistant (Cyber Forensic)
  • Candidates must have a Master’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Applications, Information Technology, or Physics with specialization in Electronics/Cyber Security from a recognized university or institute. Alternatively, candidates with a B.E./B.Tech degree in Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, or Electrical & Electronics Engineering are also eligible.
  • Age Limit : 18-27 Years.
Junior Scientific Assistant (Crime Scene/District Mobile Forensic Unit)
  • Master’s degree in Zoology / Botany / Anthropology / Microbiology / Chemistry / Physics / Toxicology / Biochemistry / Forensic Science from a Govt. recognized university/institute.
  • Age Limit : 18-27 Years.
Junior Scientific Assistant (Finger Print )
  • Master’s degree in Physics or Chemistry or Forensic Science with Physics or Chemistry as one of the subject studied for at least two years / four semesters at B. Sc. Level, from a Govt. recognized university/institute.
  • Age Limit : 18-27 Years.
Junior Scientific Assistant (Physics)
  • Master’s degree in Physics / Forensic Science with Physics as one of the subject studied for at least two years/ four semesters at B. Sc level from the recognized university.
  • Age Limit : 18-27 Years.
Technical Assistant (Hindi)
  • Candidates must have a Master’s degree in Hindi or English, or any other subject with Hindi and English as compulsory/elective subjects or as the medium of examination at the degree level, from a recognized university. Additionally, candidates must possess a recognized Diploma/Certificate in translation from Hindi to English and vice versa, or have at least 2 years of translation experience in a Central/State Government, Union Territory Administration, or Government undertaking.
  • Age Limit : Maximum 30 Years.
Assistant Archivist Grade-I
  • Master’s Degree in History with a paper in Modern Indian History from a recognized University.
  • Diploma in Archives and Record Management from a recognized University or Institute.
  • Age Limit : Maximum 30 Years.
I.T. Assistant, Grade – A
  • Candidates must have passed 12th Standard or an equivalent examination from a recognized board or institution. They should possess a typing speed of at least 8,000 key depressions per hour (equivalent to 26.67 WPM in English or Hindi) for data entry work and qualify the aptitude test. Preference will be given to candidates holding a one-year certificate course in Data Preparation & Computer Software or an equivalent qualification from a recognized institution.
  • Age Limit : Maximum 27 Years.
Fitter Grade – II
  • Persons having certificate in the Trade of Plumber from a recognised institution.
  • One year practical exp. in handling of water distribution network of C.I. and G.I. pipes and their accessories.
  • Age Limit : 20-32 Years.
Lift Operator
  • Candidates must have passed Matriculation or Higher Secondary and possess an ITI certificate in the Electrician or Wireman trade from a recognized institution.
  • Age Limit : 18 – 37 Years.
Asstt. Operator cum Mechanic (A/C)
  • Candidates must have passed Matriculation or Higher Secondary with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, along with an ITI certificate in the Refrigeration and Air Conditioning trade from a recognized institution.
  • Age Limit : 18-32 Years.
Sub Station Apprentice
  • Candidates must have passed Matriculation and possess a two-year National Trade Certificate (NTC) in the Electrician trade awarded by the National Council for Training in Vocational Trades (NCTVT), Government of India. Alternatively, candidates with an equivalent two-year Electrician certificate awarded by the Central or State Government through regular, part-time industrial, or evening classes are also eligible.
  • Age Limit : 18-32 Years.
Data Processing Assistant Grade ‘A’
  • Candidates must have a degree from a recognized university or equivalent, or a 3-year Diploma in Computer Engineering with 1 year of experience in electronic data processing, or a degree in Computer Engineering from a recognized institution/university. Additionally, candidates must possess a typing speed of at least 8,000 key depressions per hour (equivalent to 26.67 WPM in English or Hindi) for data entry work.
  • Age Limit : Maximum 30 Years.
Data Entry Operator Grade ‘B’
  • Candidates must have a degree from a recognized university or equivalent, or a 3-year diploma in Computer Engineering, Digital Electronics, or Electronics & Communication Engineering with Computer Applications/Programming as a subject. Additionally, candidates must possess a typing speed of at least 8,000 key depressions per hour (equivalent to 26.67 WPM in English or Hindi) and qualify the aptitude test.
  • Age Limit : Maximum 30 Years.
Trained Graduate Teacher (Computer Science)
  • Candidates must have a BCA degree, or a graduation degree in Computer Science with Computer Science studied as the main subject in all years, or a B.E./B.Tech. degree in Computer Science/Information Technology from a recognized university. Alternatively, candidates with a graduation degree in any discipline along with an ‘A’ Level course from DOEACC (NIELIT), Government of India, are also eligible.
  • Age Limit : Maximum 30 Years.
Domestic Science Teacher
  • Bachelor’s degree in Domestic Science / Home Science from a recognized university / institute.
  • Bachelor’s in Education with Domestic Science / Home Science as a teaching subject.
  • Age Limit : Maximum 30 Years.
Trained Graduate Teacher (Special Education Teacher)
  • Candidates must have a Graduation degree from a recognized university along with B.Ed. (Special Education) or B.Ed. (General) with a recognized Special Education diploma/certificate. They must also have qualified CTET (Elementary Stage) conducted by CBSE, with applicable relaxation for reserved categories, and possess valid registration with the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI).
  • Age Limit : Maximum 30 Years.
Special Educator (Primary)
  • Candidates must have passed 12th and possess a recognized Special Education qualification such as D.Ed. Special Education, DSE, DCBR, PGDCBR, MRW, Junior Diploma in Teaching the Deaf, Teacher Training in Visual Impairment, DVR-MR, DVTE-MR, DHLS, or any other equivalent qualification approved by RCI. They must also have qualified CTET (Primary Stage) conducted by CBSE, with applicable relaxation for reserved categories, and possess valid registration with the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI).
  • Age Limit : Maximum 30 Years.
Electrical Overseer / Sub-Inspector
  • 3 years Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering or its equivalent from a recognized university or institution.
  • Experience of one year in case of Diploma holder in the practice of Electrical Engineering in an electrical or mechanical engineering workshop or in generation or transmission or distribution of electricity, or in the administration of the Act and rules thereunder, in a position of responsibility.
  • Age Limit : 18-27 Years.

Post Name Eligibility Criteria
 Primary Level Class 1-5
  • Candidates must have 10+2 Intermediate / Senior Secondary (or equivalent) with at least 50% marks and must have passed or be appearing in the final year of a 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (B.T.C. / D.El.Ed.), or 10+2 with at least 45% marks with a 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (as per NCTE 2002 norms). Alternatively, candidates may have 10+2 with at least 50% marks and be appearing in the final year of a 4-year Bachelor of Elementary Education (B.El.Ed.), or 10+2 with at least 50% marks and a 2-year Diploma in Education (Special Education). Candidates with a Bachelor’s Degree (or equivalent) and passed or appearing in the final year of a 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (B.T.C. / D.El.Ed.) are also eligible.
Junior Level Class 6-8
  • Candidates must have a Bachelor’s Degree (or equivalent) and must have passed or be appearing in the final year of a 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (B.T.C. / D.El.Ed.), or a Bachelor’s Degree with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in the final year of B.Ed. / L.T. / Shiksha Shastri (Regular). Candidates with a Bachelor’s Degree with at least 45% marks and B.Ed. (as per NCTE norms) are also eligible.
  • Alternatively, candidates who have 10+2 Intermediate / Senior Secondary (or equivalent) with at least 50% marks and are appearing in the final year of a 4-year Bachelor of Elementary Education (B.El.Ed.), or a 4-year B.A./B.Sc.Ed or B.A.Ed/B.Sc.Ed program are eligible. Candidates with a Bachelor’s Degree with at least 50% marks and B.Ed. (Special Education), or those having a Master’s Degree with at least 55% marks along with a 3-year integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. course, are also eligible. For more details, candidates are advised to read the official notification carefully.
